raw_consumer_statement:
Product Credit card Issue Charged for a service I never received Company CitibankXXXX XXXX XXXX What Happen : I purchased an airline ticket with XXXX  using my Citibank credit card on XX/XX/XXXX, for a flight scheduled on XX/XX/XXXX. Despite arriving at the gate before the close of boarding, my travel companion and I were denied boarding. The gate agent had already given our seats to standby passengers. We were stranded, had to rebook flights at over triple the cost, and lost three days of our trip. 

XXXX initially told us we were marked as a no-show. Later, they contradicted that by stating we did, in fact, arrive on time but were denied boarding because baggage check had closed. This explanation also does not apply, as we had already paid for our bags and only had carry-on luggage. These conflicting messages, all from official XXXX communications ( which we have saved ), show a clear unwillingness by the airline to take responsibility for their mistake. Instead of offering a resolution, XXXX repeatedly referred us back to Citibank and failed to honor the refund they promised. 

We were told by XXXX that a full refund, including baggage fees, would be issued within 90 days. Trusting their word, we waited until XX/XX/XXXX, but never received the refund. 

Meanwhile, I had paid for XXXX carry-on bags on XX/XX/XXXX, using a separate XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX credit card one for {$100.00} and the other for {$66.00}. After XXXX continued to delay, I submitted a dispute to XXXX  XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. Bank XXXX XXXX reviewed the case and credited the full amount, recognizing that the service was never rendered. 

In contrast, when I submitted a dispute to Citibank on XX/XX/XXXX, I followed all instructions, mailed documentation twice, and waited monthsonly for the bank to deny my dispute on XX/XX/XXXX, citing that too much time had passed since the original billing date. I was never told up front that the dispute might be rejected regardless of evidence or XXXX  delay. A Citibank supervisor eventually offered a {$130.00} goodwill credit, stating XXXX had not responded to them. 

XXXX later issued an incorrect refund of {$64.00} instead of the promised {$600.00}. I am still owed {$540.00}, and it is unacceptable that Citibank has refused to resolve this, while XXXX  XXXX XXXX honored their dispute process correctly. I am requesting a full review and reimbursement of the remaining balance owed to me.
